channel.title: flove making-of — mobile questions
channel.description: New mobile design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What is the flove approach to mobile-first design?
item.description:
• Strict mobile-first — Design for mobile first, enhance for desktop. CSS media queries follow this pattern. • Desktop-first with mobile — Design for desktop, adapt for mobile. More common, less future-proof. • Equal targets — Design for both simultaneously. Balanced, more work.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Strict mobile-first
